plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to record exercise videos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your microphone for video recording.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to record exercise videos for form analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone to record audio with exercise videos.
